assertionResults.reason: ToolbarButton targeted tests confirmed child label rendering, one-click handler behavior, ghost styling, and className passthrough.
evidence: Command passed: npm --prefix "D:\coding\somewhat" run test:frontend -- src/ui/BrandMark.test.tsx src/ui/StatBlock.test.tsx src/ui/RecDot.test.tsx src/ui/KbdHint.test.tsx src/ui/ToolbarButton.test.tsx src/ui/PanelHeader.test.tsx src/ui/IconBtn.test.tsx
src/ui/ToolbarButton.test.tsx includes assertions for getByRole('button', { name: 'Save' }), onClick called once, gp-btn + gp-btn--ghost classes, and custom className passthrough.

assertionResults.reason: IconBtn targeted tests confirmed accessible labeling, click behavior, hot/compact/disabled states, and className passthrough.
evidence: The targeted vitest command exited 0 with src/ui/IconBtn.test.tsx passing all 16 tests.
src/ui/IconBtn.test.tsx verifies semantic button rendering, aria-label/title accessibility, gp-icn-hot and gp-icn--compact classes, disabled preventing clicks, and custom className support.

assertionResults.reason: Static analysis shows the barrel file re-exports all seven shared primitives and each primitive lives in its own src/ui module.
evidence: src/ui/index.ts re-exports BrandMark, StatBlock, RecDot, KbdHint, ToolbarButton, PanelHeader, and IconBtn.
src/ui directory contains BrandMark.tsx, StatBlock.tsx, RecDot.tsx, KbdHint.tsx, ToolbarButton.tsx, PanelHeader.tsx, and IconBtn.tsx, each with a colocated .test.tsx file.
The targeted vitest run passed barrel-import smoke tests already present for KbdHint, ToolbarButton, and IconBtn.

assertionResults.reason: Both consumer views import shared primitives from the @/ui barrel and static grep found no local shared primitive definitions in those view files.
evidence: src/editor/EditorView.tsx:8 imports { BrandMark, KbdHint, PanelHeader, StatBlock, ToolbarButton } from "@/ui".
Static grep for local function/const definitions of BrandMark, KbdHint, ToolbarButton, PanelHeader, IconBtn, StatBlock, and RecDot returned no matches in either view file.

assertionResults.reason: Interactive primitive tests confirm semantic button elements with accessible names, and supporting shared-component tests confirm decorative aria-hidden behavior.
evidence: src/ui/ToolbarButton.test.tsx checks tagName === 'BUTTON' and resolves the button by accessible name from its children.
src/ui/IconBtn.test.tsx checks tagName === 'BUTTON' and resolves the button by accessible name from ariaLabel/title.
Supporting shared-component tests passed for decorative aria-hidden behavior in src/ui/BrandMark.test.tsx and src/ui/PanelHeader.test.tsx.

assertionResults.reason: All seven shared primitives have colocated test files and the focused shared-component vitest run completed with zero failures.
evidence: src/ui contains 7 shared primitive test files: BrandMark.test.tsx, StatBlock.test.tsx, RecDot.test.tsx, KbdHint.test.tsx, ToolbarButton.test.tsx, PanelHeader.test.tsx, IconBtn.test.tsx.
Focused vitest result: 7 passed test files, 80 passed tests, 0 failures.
